name: my-plugins
description: Claude Code plugins for Firefox Smart Window prototyping

plugins.name: qa-extension
plugins.description: Test, debug, and fix Firefox browser extensions

plugins.name: brainstorm
plugins.description: Brainstorm ideas for a new Firefox Smart Window feature with anti-bias domain-shift

plugins.name: prototype
plugins.description: Coordinator that orchestrates the full prototype pipeline: spec, design, build, QA

plugins.name: prototype-spec
plugins.description: PM agent that produces structured prototype specs

plugins.name: prototype-design
plugins.description: UX Designer agent that produces UI specs and Figma designs

plugins.name: prototype-build
plugins.description: Engineer agent that builds prototypes from spec and design

plugins.name: prototype-qa
plugins.description: QA agent that validates prototypes end-to-end via Marionette

plugins.name: prototype-distill
plugins.description: Compresses Firefox Smart Window codebase context into a focused build reference

plugins.name: prototype-review
plugins.description: Adversarial review agent that finds problems in specs/designs before build
